interpretation: Full baseline mechanism: country anchor, resistant importation, strain-specific treatment and PEP, neutral fitness.
Tests treatment-mediated selection by making resistant treatment effects equal to sensitive-strain effects.
Tests PEP-mediated selection by making resistant PEP effectiveness equal to sensitive-strain PEP effectiveness.
Tests neutral strain competition under importation when treatment and PEP do not favor resistant strains.
Fitness-cost stress test retaining baseline importation and management assumptions.
Tests dependence on ongoing resistant-strain importation after the analysis-start anchor.
Current macrolide treatment and baseline resistant-strain PEP effectiveness.

policy_read: 25% testing/treatment uptake plus assumed PEP improvement
interpretation: Quarter uptake of resistance-guided treatment with partial restoration of resistant-strain PEP effectiveness.

policy_read: 50% testing/treatment uptake plus assumed PEP improvement
interpretation: Half uptake of resistance-guided treatment with partial restoration of resistant-strain PEP effectiveness.

policy_read: 75% testing/treatment uptake plus assumed PEP improvement
interpretation: Three-quarter uptake of resistance-guided treatment with partial restoration of resistant-strain PEP effectiveness.

policy_read: 100% testing/treatment uptake plus assumed PEP improvement
interpretation: Full resistance-guided treatment scenario used in the main analysis.
Half uptake of resistance-guided treatment; resistant-strain PEP effectiveness remains at baseline.
Full treatment restoration but no restoration of resistant-strain PEP effectiveness.

policy_read: 50% uptake plus assumed PEP improvement with lower PEP reach
interpretation: Half uptake and half baseline PEP reach, approximating delayed activation, lower adherence, or household-only reach.
